svg.title: HyperWeave 33-Genome Match Cut — Stat Cards
svg.desc: All 33 compositor-generated genome variants flashing sequentially through one fixed frame at 400ms per card (13200ms total cycle). Each card carries a synced subtitle showing the exact HyperWeave serve URL that generates it. The frame stays constant; only the genome phenotype changes — chromatic envelope, paradigm structure, material treatment all swap while the spatial composition holds.

rdf:Description.dc:title: HyperWeave 33-Genome Match Cut — Stat Cards
rdf:Description.dc:creator: HyperWeave Compositor v0.3.10 + match-cut assembler (InnerAura Labs)

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Pure phenotype showcase with live attribution. Each stat cards card is paired with its exact compose-URL so viewers can copy/paste any state into a README. The frame holds constant; only the genome DNA — and consequently the URL's `?variant=` query — changes.
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Single shared keyframe (mc) + per-card animation-delay stagger across 13200ms. Sharp opacity step gives the cut feel. Card and subtitle text share the same delay so the URL always identifies the visible card. URL pattern matches the HW serve grammar at /v1/stat/.../ {genome}.{motion}.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Frame width sized to the longest URL (not the largest card) so the subtitle never truncates. Chose to override the compositor's --dna-chart-main → --dna-bg fallback for brutalist-light variants because their dark substrate tone reads as bleed when the chart is composited onto the marquee's dark nebula bg; using --dna-signal makes the chart line carry the variant's identity instead.

svg.desc: A stats artifact, using brutalist genome.
